objective: Prove reviewed production egress policy generation is rendered into the production manifest and enforced by release validation without replacing external evidence requirements.
rollbackNotes: Preserve unrelated user changes; revert only this checkpoint scope if explicitly approved.
nextAction: Stop safely per user request after recording; do not start the next item until resumed.
outcome: Strict egress release validation now validates reviewed evidence, generates or checks a reviewed external egress NetworkPolicy, proves it renders through a temporary production Kustomize overlay, verifies evidence hash/CIDR/port/protocol inclusion, rejects stale or missing generated policies, rejects FQDN rules until a supported generator exists, and guards the app-label selector against uncovered Deployment pod templates. This does not replace target-environment egress evidence.
